title: eryngium bornmuelleri
intro: Eryngium bornmuelleri, also known as Bornmueller's eryngo, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the mountainous regions of North Africa and the Mediterranean. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Eryngium bornmuelleri include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
